name: Birdie's Golf Lounge - Cedar City, UT
address: 580 S Main St, Cedar City, UT 84720
about: Birdie's Golf Lounge - Cedar City is an indoor golf venue featuring a variety of simulator bays for play, practice, and competition. The facility is equipped with high-end Uneekor XO and XO2 simulators, utilizing advanced dual-camera swing analysis and launch monitor technology to provide accurate feedback on every shot. A full bar and food service are available, creating a laid-back, social atmosphere where golfers of all skill levels can play 18 holes in about an hour without weather concerns. Pricing is structured on a per-bay hourly basis, with memberships and corporate plans offering additional value for regular players.
why_golfers_like_it: Over 1,000 real PGA courses available to play worldwide
Top-tier Uneekor simulators with dual swing camera feedback and accurate launch tracking
No weather delays, lost balls, or darkness—play anytime in a controlled environment
Fast 18-hole rounds take only about an hour per person
Social, laid-back atmosphere with live sports and entertainment on TVs

food_and_drink.notes: Snacks and full kitchen food service available on-site.
Full bar with drinks available for purchase during your session.

simulator_hardware.notes: Dual Swing Optix Cameras for swing video feedback from two angles; advanced sensors track ball and club movement for detailed data on ball speed, spin rate, and launch angle.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The FAQ does not specify whether club rentals are available. It's recommended to bring your own clubs or contact the venue directly for rental options.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drink are not permitted. Birdie's Golf Lounge offers its own snacks, drinks, and full bar service for purchase during your session.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It takes about 1 hour to play 18 holes per person. For a group of 4 playing 18 holes, expect 2.5 to 3 hours. Shorter formats and arcade-style games are also available for quicker sessions.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly. It accommodates all skill levels and mentions having a laid-back environment where friends and families can enjoy the experience together.
